mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO attendance_settings(id, period_name, period_start_month, period_start_day, period_end_month, period_end_day, default_period, enabled, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.periodName}, #{item.periodStartMonth}, #{item.periodStartDay}, #{item.periodEndMonth}, #{item.periodEndDay}, #{item.defaultPeriod}, #{item.enabled}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
